topConstraint: CYVX must close the mission outcome loop so intelligence compounds from actual results.

nextBestAction.title: Build Outcome Capture + Trust Calibration.
nextBestAction.why: Universal Capability Kernel + Universal Intelligence Loop can unify repos, businesses, agents, workflows, products, and markets.

mission.title: Close the Universal Intelligence Loop
mission.objective: Add outcome capture and trust calibration so missions improve CYVX over time.
